data.title: AI Takes Flight: Singapore Airlines Taps Salesforce For Next-Gen Customer Service Tech
data.description: Salesforce partners with Singapore Airlines to enhance customer service through AI-driven solutions and Agentforce technology.

data.title: BlackBerry QNX Introduces All-in-One Functional Safety Platform for Smarter, Safer Robotics
data.description: BlackBerry unit QNX launched a FuSa platform for advanced robotic systems, collaborating with Intel and NexCOBOT to consolidate safety and AI workloads.

data.title: Tesla Stock Pares Early Losses, Rises 6.4% After Key Signal
data.description: A significant trading signal occurred for Tesla stock, as it demonstrated a Power Inflow at $222.68, after which TSLA rose up to 6.4%.

data.title: US Crypto Users Missed Receiving Over $2.5 Billion In Airdrops Due To Geoblocking: Report
data.description: Geoblocking policies in cryptocurrency airdrops may have cost Americans up to $2.6 billion in potential earnings from 2020 to 2024, a report released Monday revealed.

data.title: Goldman Sachs Sees Copper Imports Frontrunning Tariffs As FCX Positions To Benefit
